hypothesis: Adding additional aromatic residues at positions 6, 7, 11 and introducing a negatively charged residue at position 5 will increase hydrophobic and electrostatic complementarity with the SSTR2 binding pocket, resulting in a more negative ddG compared to the best candidate from iteration 7.

critic_feedback_used.hypothesis: The current designs are limited by rigid backbone sampling, leading to structural clashes. Introducing flexible backbone sampling or side‑chain rotamer optimization should reduce clashes and improve stability scores.

proposed_changes.rationale: The single structural failure is due to a clash exceeding the current threshold. Tightening the clash limit will reduce such failures without discarding too many candidates.
Increasing the pool size provides more diversity and a higher chance of generating candidates that satisfy all QC gates.
